info.title: Pluggy Open Finance API
info.description: Pluggy open finance API for connecting to financial institutions, managing items, accounts, transactions, investments, and webhooks.

post.description: Authenticate with client credentials to obtain an API key valid for 2 hours.
Create a limited access token for frontend applications, valid for 30 minutes.

post.summary: Send MFA response for an item

get.description: Retrieve the real-time balance for a specific account.

patch.description: Update transaction metadata such as category.

get.summary: Get identity information by item ID

post.description: Create a customer for payment initiation operations.
Create a recipient for payment initiation.

bearerAuth.description: API key obtained from the /auth endpoint

apiKey.description: JWT authentication key for the API, valid for 2 hours

itemId.description: Optional item ID to update an existing connection

accessToken.description: Limited access token valid for 30 minutes
